meta-ads.title: Facebook & Meta Ads
meta-ads.description: Ultra-precise targeting to reach the most qualified prospects for your training programs.
meta-ads.longDescription: We build custom audiences, high-converting creatives, and continuously optimized acquisition funnels on Meta (Facebook and Instagram).

google-ads.title: Google Ads
google-ads.description: Capture search intent the moment your future students look for a training program.
google-ads.longDescription: Search, Performance Max, and YouTube Ads driven by data to capture high-intent demand and maximize your advertising ROI.

marketing-automation.title: Marketing Automation
marketing-automation.description: Automated email sequences to nurture your leads through to enrollment.
marketing-automation.longDescription: Multichannel nurturing scenarios (email, SMS, WhatsApp) connected to your CRM to turn cold leads into enrollments.

landing-pages.title: Landing Pages & CRO
landing-pages.description: Fast, conversion-focused landing pages that turn traffic into qualified inquiries.
landing-pages.longDescription: Design, copywriting, and conversion rate optimization (CRO) with ongoing A/B testing to maximize every dirham you invest.

social-media.title: Social Media Management
social-media.description: A consistent social presence that strengthens your brand and feeds your pipeline.
social-media.longDescription: Editorial strategy, content production, and community management to build a strong, desirable education brand.

crm-data.title: CRM & Data Analytics
crm-data.description: Centralize your leads and steer acquisition with clear dashboards.
crm-data.longDescription: CRM setup and optimization, real-time dashboards, and attribution for data-driven decisions.
